_readme: Copy to {repo_name}_eec.json in your repo root. Set maturity=established only after manually confirming the test structure runs. To generate values for a new repo: ask Claude to read .claude/factory/orchestrator.py and scan your repo structure, then ask it to suggest values for each field here.
_test_strategy_note: test_strategy (pytest / playwright / combined) lives in each PRD's JSON contract block — NOT here. The EEC test_command is the runtime execution invocation for pytest only. Playwright is always run via 'npx playwright test' using playwright_command in factory_config.json.

test_tiers._note: Four-tier layout: unit/pytest (fast, no DB), unit/playwright (Vite only, mocked API), e2e/playwright (full stack, PR gate), e2e/py (full-stack pytest integration). Omit tiers that don't apply.

_example_remove_this.reason: get_mongodb() handles connection pooling and vault credential resolution — direct pymongo breaks test environments

execution._deploy_command_note: Set to your deploy invocation e.g. 'make -j' or 'docker-compose up -d'. null = no deploy step.
execution._services_note: Map service names to {path, deploy_target}. deploy_target is passed as args to deploy_command.
